name: Switch
description: A toggle switch for binary on/off selections.

props.name: size
props.description: Switch size controlling track, thumb, and label dimensions.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the switch is on. Reflects to the `checked` attribute.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and apply dimmed styling.

props.name: invalid
props.description: Apply error border styling when unchecked.

props.name: loading
props.description: Show a loading spinner inside the thumb and disable interaction.

props.name: showIcons
props.description: Show check/cross icons inside the thumb.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme for the checked state track, icon, and hover border.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Position of the label relative to the switch track.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name, used in form submissions.

slots.name: description
slots.description: Helper text rendered below the label.

events.name: kb-change
events.description: Checked state changed. Detail: `{ checked: boolean }`.
